message.content:
### 1. Type of Page  
This is a **YouTube Creator Dashboard/Profile Page** for a content creator, displaying analytics, performance metrics, and account information.  


### 2. UI Elements (Top to Bottom, Left to Right)  
#### Header Section  
- **Top Status Bar**: Time (9:41), battery icon, Wi-Fi signal, cellular signal.  
- **YouTube Logo**: "YOUTUBE" in white, bold, uppercase.  
- **Search Icon**: Magnifying glass (white).  
- **Notifications Bell Icon**: White, with a red badge (1 notification).  
- **Profile Picture**: Circular image of a man (dark skin tone, sunglasses, black shirt).  
- **Menu Icon**: Three horizontal white lines (hamburger menu).  

#### Creator Profile Card  
- **Profile Picture**: Circular image (same as header).  
- **Name**: "Brian Creator" (white text, bold).  
- **Verification Badge**: Blue checkmark (next to name).  
- **Level/Role**: "Level 48 • Creator" (white text, smaller).  
- **XP Progress Bar**: Purple gradient bar (24,680 / 30,000 XP).  
- **Today’s Earnings Section**:  
  - Label: "Today’s Earnings" (white text, smaller).  
  - Amount: "$156.80" (white text, bold).  
  - Comparison: "18.6% vs yesterday" (green text, smaller, with upward green triangle).  
- **Wallet Icon**: Purple square with white wallet icon (top-right of card).  

#### Key Metrics Row  
- **Views Card**:  
  - Icon: Play button (teal).  
  - Label: "Views" (white text).  
  - Value: "2.4M" (white text, bold).  
  - Growth: "28.5%" (green text, with upward green triangle).  
- **Watchtime Card**:  
  - Icon: Clock (purple).  
  - Label: "Watchtime" (white text).  
  - Value: "156.7K" (white text, bold).  
  - Growth: "34.2%" (green text, with upward green triangle).  
- **Followers Card**:  
  - Icon: People (blue).  
  - Label: "Followers" (white text).  
  - Value: "+12.6K" (white text, bold).  
  - Growth: "18.9%" (green text, with upward green triangle).  
- **Revenue Card**:  
  - Icon: Dollar sign (gold).  
  - Label: "Revenue" (white text).  
  - Value: "$18,540" (white text, bold).  
  - Growth: "26.7%" (green text, with upward green triangle).  
- **Eng. Rate Card**:  
  - Icon: Heart (red).  
  - Label: "Eng. Rate" (white text).  
  - Value: "12.8%" (white text, bold).  
  - Growth: "8.4%" (green text, with upward green triangle).  
- **More Button**: Three dots (white, top-right of row).  

#### Performance Over Time & Viral Score Section  
- **Performance Over Time Card**:  
  - Title: "Performance Over Time" (white text, bold).  
  - Time Filter: "7D" (white text, dropdown).  
  - Legend: "Views" (blue dot), "Watchtime (hrs)" (purple dot), "Revenue" (green dot).  
  - Line Graph: Three lines (blue for views, purple for watchtime, green for revenue) over dates (May 10–May 16).  
- **Viral Score Card**:  
  - Title: "Viral Score" (white text, bold) with info icon (ⓘ).  
  - Score: "87" (white text, large, bold).  
  - Max: "/100" (white text, smaller).  
  - Rating: "Excellent" (green text, bold).  
  - Growth: "23 this week" (green text, with upward green triangle).  
  - Circular Gauge: Purple-to-green gradient (87/100).  

#### Top Performing Video & AI Coach Section  
- **Top Performing Video Card**:  
  - Title: "Top Performing Video" (white text, bold) with "View all" (purple text, smaller, right-aligned).  
  - Thumbnail: Image of a man with "NEVER GIVE UP" text (landscape, 16:9).  
  - Duration: "0:58" (white text, bottom-left of thumbnail).  
  - Title: "Never Give Up – Motivational Clip" (white text, bold).  
  - Metrics:  
    - Views: "1.2M" (white text).  
    - Likes: "98.7K" (white text).  
    - Revenue: "$3,456" (white text).  
- **AI Coach Card**:  
  - Title: "AI Coach" (white text, bold) with "NEW" (purple badge, smaller).  
  - Avatar: Blue robot with glowing eyes (right-aligned).  
  - Text: "You’re doing great! Here’s what you should focus on." (white text, smaller).  
  - Bullet Points:  
    - Green upward arrow: "Motivational clips are performing 42% better." (white text).  
    - Yellow info icon: "Improve your hook in the first 3 seconds." (white text).  
    - Blue info icon: "Best time to post today is 7PM – 9PM." (white text).  
  - Button: "View All Recommendations" (purple, rounded, white text).  

#### Audience Overview, Revenue, & Live Now Section  
- **Audience Overview Card**:  
  - Title: "Audience Overview" (white text, bold) with "View all" (purple text, smaller, right-aligned).  
  - Metrics:  
    - Total Followers: "256.4K" (white text, bold) with "12.6%" (green text, growth).  
    - Active Followers: "89.7K" (white text, bold) with "18.4%" (green text, growth).  
    - Top Country: "Kenya" (white text) with "28.6%" (purple text, progress bar).  
  - Donut Chart: Purple/green/red segments (audience demographics).  
- **Revenue Card**:  
  - Title: "Revenue" (white text, bold) with "View all" (purple text, smaller, right-aligned).  
  - This Week: "$12,540.60" (white text, bold) with "28.6%" (green text, growth).  
  - Line Graph: Purple line (revenue trend).  
  - Breakdown:  
    - Ads: "57.8%" (purple text, with purple icon).  
    - Gifts: "28.0%" (red text, with red icon).  
    - Sponsors: "15.8%" (blue text, with blue icon).  
    - Other: "13.4%" (gray text, with gray icon).  
- **Live Now Card**:  
  - Title: "Live Now" (white text, bold) with red "LIVE" badge (top-right).  
  - Metrics:  
    - Live Viewers: "3,254" (white text).  
    - Peak Viewers: "8,921" (white text).  
    - Watchtime (Live): "1,256 hrs" (white text).  
    - Gifts (Live): "$456.80" (white text).  
  - Line Graph: Purple line (live viewers trend).  
  - Button: "Go to Live" (purple, rounded, white text).  

#### Audience Retention & Traffic Sources Section  
- **Audience Retention Card**:  
  - Title: "Audience Retention" (white text, bold) with info icon (ⓘ).  
  - View all: "View all" (purple text, smaller, right-aligned).  
  - Metrics:  
    - Avg. View Duration: "0:37 (42%)" (white text).  
    - Completion Rate: "38.6%" (white text).  
    - Replays: "2.8M" (white text).  
    - Retention Score: "76/100" (white text).  
  - Line Graph: Purple line (retention over time, 0:00–1:00).  
  - Annotations:  
    - Green: "Strong Hook" (top-left of graph).  
    - Red: "Drop-off at 0:17" (middle-left of graph).  
    - Blue: "Replay Moment" (bottom-middle of graph).  
    - Orange: "Spike Moment" (bottom-right of graph).  
- **Traffic Sources Card**:  
  - Title: "Traffic Sources" (white text, bold) with "View all" (purple text, smaller, right-aligned).  
  - List:  
    - Reels Feed: "48.2%" (purple text, with purple icon).  
    - Shares: "24.8%" (red text, with red icon).  
    - Following Feed: "12.8%" (green text, with green icon).  
    - Search: "8.4%" (orange text, with orange icon).  
    - External: "3.8%" (blue text, with blue icon).  
    - Other: "2.0%" (gray text, with gray icon).  

#### Bottom Navigation Bar  
- **Home Icon**: Purple house (active).  
- **Home Label**: "Home" (purple text).  
- **Clips Icon**: White play button (inactive).  
- **Clips Label**: "Clips" (white text).  
- **Post Icon**: Purple plus sign (inactive).  
- **Post Label**: "Post" (white text).  
- **Stream Icon**: White broadcast symbol (inactive).  
- **Stream Label**: "Stream" (white text).  
- **Menu Icon**: White grid (inactive).  
- **Menu Label**: "Menu" (white text).  


### 3. Layout Structure  
- **Header**: Fixed at top, spanning full width (status bar + YouTube logo + icons).  
- **Profile Card**: Full-width, below header.  
- **Key Metrics Row**: Full-width, below profile card (6 cards in a row, responsive to screen size).  
- **Two-Column Section**: "Performance Over Time" (left) and "Viral Score" (right), full-width.  
- **Two-Column Section**: "Top Performing Video" (left) and "AI Coach" (right), full-width.  
- **Three-Column Section**: "Audience Overview" (left), "Revenue" (middle), "Live Now" (right), full-width.  
- **Two-Column Section**: "Audience Retention" (left) and "Traffic Sources" (right), full-width.  
- **Bottom Navigation**: Fixed at bottom, spanning full width (5 tabs).  


### 4. Colors, Gradients, Styling  
- **Background**: Solid black (#000000).  
- **Text**: White (#FFFFFF) for primary text; green (#00FF00) for growth indicators; purple (#6200EE) for accents (buttons, badges, progress bars); red (#FF0000) for "LIVE" badge; teal (#00CED1) for views icon; purple (#9C27B0) for watchtime icon; blue (#2196F3) for followers icon; gold (#FFD700) for revenue icon; red (#FF5252) for engagement icon.  
- **Gradients**: Purple-to-green gradient for Viral Score gauge; purple gradient for XP progress bar; purple-to-red gradient for Revenue breakdown icons.  
- **Styling**: Rounded corners on cards/buttons; bold text for key metrics; smaller text for labels/growth; line graphs with colored lines (blue, purple, green); donut chart with purple/green/red segments.  


### 5. Icons, Badges, Buttons, Tabs, Sections  
- **Icons**: Play (views), Clock (watchtime), People (followers), Dollar (revenue), Heart (engagement), Info (ⓘ), Robot (AI Coach), House (Home), Play (Clips), Plus (Post), Broadcast (Stream), Grid (Menu).  
- **Badges**: Blue checkmark (verification), Purple "NEW" (AI Coach), Red "LIVE" (Live Now).  
- **Buttons**: Purple "View all" (section headers), Purple "View All Recommendations" (AI Coach), Purple "Go to Live" (Live Now), Purple "Post" (bottom nav).  
- **Tabs**: "7D" (Performance Over Time filter), "Home/Clips/Post/Stream/Menu" (bottom nav).  
- **Sections**: Profile Card, Key Metrics, Performance Over Time, Viral Score, Top Performing Video, AI Coach, Audience Overview, Revenue, Live Now, Audience Retention, Traffic Sources.  


### 6. Data Shown  
- **Profile**: Name (Brian Creator), Level (48), Role (Creator), XP (24,680/30,000), Earnings ($156.80, +18.6% vs yesterday).  
- **Metrics**: Views (2.4M, +28.5%), Watchtime (156.7K, +34.2%), Followers (+12.6K, +18.9%), Revenue ($18,540, +26.7%), Eng. Rate (12.8%, +8.4%).  
- **Performance**: Line graph (views, watchtime, revenue over 7 days), Viral Score (87/100, Excellent, +23 this week).  
- **Top Video**: Title (Never Give Up – Motivational Clip), Views (1.2M), Likes (98.7K), Revenue ($3,456).  
- **AI Coach**: Recommendations (motivational clips, hook improvement, posting time).  
- **Audience**: Total Followers (256.4K, +12.6%), Active Followers (89.7K, +18.4%), Top Country (Kenya, 28.6%).  
- **Revenue**: This Week ($12,540.60, +28.6%), Breakdown (Ads 57.8%, Gifts 28.0%, Sponsors 15.8%, Other 13.4%).  
- **Live Now**: Live Viewers (3,254), Peak Viewers (8,921), Watchtime (1,256 hrs), Gifts ($456.80).  
- **Retention**: Avg. View Duration (0:37, 42%), Completion Rate (38.6%), Replays (2.8M), Retention Score (76/100).  
- **Traffic Sources**: Reels Feed (48.2%), Shares (24.8%), Following Feed (12.8%), Search (8.4%), External (3.8%), Other (2.0%).  


### 7. Special Controls, Toggles, Interactive Elements  
- **Dropdown Filter**: "7D" (Performance Over Time, to switch time range).  
- **Buttons**: "View all" (section headers), "View All Recommendations" (AI Coach), "Go to Live" (Live Now), "Post" (bottom nav).  
- **Info Icons**: ⓘ (Viral Score, Audience Retention) for tooltips.  
- **Bottom Navigation Tabs**: Tappable (Home, Clips, Post, Stream, Menu) to switch screens.  


### 8. Bottom Navigation Bar  
- **Layout**: Horizontal row, fixed at bottom, full width.  
- **Tabs**:  
  - **Home**: Purple house icon + "Home" label (active).  
  - **Clips**: White play icon + "Clips" label (inactive).  
  - **Post**: Purple plus icon + "Post" label (inactive).  
  - **Stream**: White broadcast icon + "Stream" label (inactive).  
  - **Menu**: White grid icon + "Menu" label (inactive).  


### 9. Tabs/Filters  
- **Performance Over Time**: "7D" (dropdown filter for time range: 7 days).  
- **Bottom Navigation**: "Home", "Clips", "Post", "Stream", "Menu" (primary tabs).  


### 10. Header/Top Section  
- **Components**:  
  - **Status Bar**: Time (9:41), battery, Wi-Fi, cellular.  
  - **YouTube Logo**: "YOUTUBE" (white, bold, uppercase, left-aligned).  
  - **Icons**: Search (magnifying glass), Notifications (bell with red badge), Profile Picture (circular), Menu (hamburger).  
- **Styling**: Black background, white text/icons, rounded profile picture, red notification badge.  


This detailed breakdown covers all visual and interactive elements, enabling precise recreation of the UI.
